---
title: "**Raunak Farhaz**"
image: "images/profile.jpeg"
about:
    template: solana
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 16em 
    links:
        - icon: envelope
          href: mailto:farhazraunak@proton.me
        - icon: github
          href: https://github.com/Raunak12775
        - icon: gitlab
          href: https://gitlab.com/rfarhaz
        - icon: bluesky
          href: https://bsky.app/profile/raunakfarhaz.bsky.social
        - icon: twitter-x
          href: https://twitter.com/Farhazraunak
toc: false
---

Doing my Ph.D. in Theoretical Chemistry at [**Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin**](https://www.chemie.hu-berlin.de/en/forschung-en/theoretical-chemistry/team/ag-bischoff). My research interest lies in the understanding of chemical bonding and its philosophical aspects. You can find **pedagogic articles/essays** in [Learn](resources/learn.qmd).

For collaborations send a "Hi" at my [email](mailto:farhazraunak@proton.me).
